title: Review for wording conflicts against model: Kernel and FUGUE are peer orchestrators; Kernel when launched from Codex, FUGUE when launched from Claude Code. Check these files only and output concise conflicts with exact replacement text: /Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md /Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md /Us...
summary_text: 1. [AGENTS.md:40](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L40) makes `Kernel` the universal orchestrator in a cross-workspace file, which conflicts with the peer model. Replace with: ```md ## Active Orchestrator Policy (MUST) - All non-trivial work must be executed as the active orchestrator domain with parallel excitation: `Kernel` when launched from Codex, `FUGUE` when launched from Claude Code. ``` 2. [AGENTS.md:68](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L68) frames `FUGUE` as the control plane above `Kernel`. Replace with: ```md - Baseline fallback keeps the selected orchestrator domain running; it does not switch `FUGUE` to `Kernel` or `Kernel` to `FUGUE` without explicit user instruction. ``` 3. [.claude/AGENTS.md:38](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L38) defines `FUGUE` as the orchestrator and `Codex`/`GLM` as engines, which breaks peer wording. Replace with: ```md | Role | Launcher | Scope | |------|----------|-------| | **FUGUE** | Claude Code | Peer orchestrator when launched from Claude Code; routing, judgment, and user dialogue | | **Kernel** | Codex | Peer orchestrator when launched from Codex; local execution, implementation, analysis, review, planning, and exploration | | **GLM lane** | GLM | Verification, audit, research, documentation | | **On-demand** | Gemini | UI/UX, image analysis | ``` 4. [.claude/AGENTS.md:46](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L46) explicitly makes `FUGUE` the control plane and the others engines. Replace with: ```md - Claude Code から起動した場合は FUGUE、Codex から起動した場合は Kernel を用いる。FUGUE と Kernel は peer orchestrators であり、互いを control plane / engine として扱わない。委譲先 lane の rate limit は auto fallback 対象。 ``` 5. [FUGUE.md:30](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/docs/FUGUE.md#L30) again gives `FUGUE` one-sided control-plane wording. Replace with: ```md - Baseline fallback lanes do not replace the active orchestrator domain; they do not switch `FUGUE` to `Kernel` or `Kernel` to `FUGUE` without explicit user instruction. ``` Strong conflicts were limited to the files above.
